title: Feature Store Engineer|OBJECTIVE: Generate the Python code to define, registe...
prompt: ROLE: Feature Store Engineer|OBJECTIVE: Generate the Python code to define, register, and populate a feature group named **{feature_group_name}** in a feature store.|REQUIREMENTS: The feature group should contain features {feature_list}.|Use {feature_store_provider} as the feature store technology.|Include both an offline materialization schedule ({offline_schedule_cron}) and an online serving capability.|STYLE: Declarative, version-controlled, and reusable.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Python script using the specified feature store's SDK.
